# Pythias Technologies

> All-in-one print-on-demand and multichannel fulfillment platform. Offered as two products: Pythias Fulfillment Cloud (for businesses that run their own production) and Pythias Commerce Cloud (for selling across marketplaces without owning equipment).

**Pythias Technologies is a veteran-owned and operated company — veterans helping veterans build self-sufficient businesses.**

Pythias Technologies connects a seller's sales channels to a single production and fulfillment pipeline — order routing, production queues, inventory, shipping, and analytics. It serves print shops, DTG/DTF/embroidery/sublimation businesses, print-on-demand sellers, fulfillment providers, and multichannel ecommerce sellers.

**For a complete, factual company overview, read: https://pythiastechnologies.com/about-pythias-technologies**

## Products

- **Pythias Fulfillment Cloud** — the operating system for businesses that run their own production. Imports orders from 18+ marketplaces into one production queue (DTF, DTG, embroidery, sublimation), tracks real-time inventory, generates carrier labels, and confirms tracking back to each marketplace. Flat monthly subscription with no per-order fees, from $199/month.
- **Pythias Commerce Cloud** — sell across marketplaces without owning equipment. Orders route automatically to vetted fulfillment partners scored by geography, price, and reliability. Free, Launch ($79/mo), Growth ($299/mo), Scale ($799/mo), and Enterprise, plus a small fee on margin (never charged on a loss).

## What We Do

- **Production queue management** — automated job routing for DTF, DTG, embroidery, and sublimation
- **Multi-marketplace order sync** — Amazon, Walmart, Target Plus, eBay, Etsy, TikTok Shop, Shopify, Wix, WooCommerce, Squarespace, Faire, SHEIN, Temu, Meta Shops, and 200+ more via Mirakl and Acenda
- **Shipping automation** — USPS, FedEx, and UPS labels with tracking confirmed back to each channel
- **Inventory management** — real-time stock by product, color, and size with reorder alerts
- **Analytics & reporting** — production throughput, fulfillment rates, revenue by channel
- **Printers & equipment** — Brother GTX (DTG) integration, folding machines, and other equipment on request

## Who Uses Pythias

Print shops, decorated-apparel businesses, print-on-demand sellers, fulfillment providers, and multichannel ecommerce sellers — including sellers who want to sell across channels without running their own production (via Commerce Cloud).

## Key Pages

- `/about-pythias-technologies` — Canonical company overview: what Pythias is, both products, who uses it, supported marketplaces and printers, FAQ
- `/` — Home: platform overview, the two Clouds, features, pricing CTA
- `/fulfillment-cloud` — Fulfillment Cloud product and pricing
- `/commerce-cloud` — Commerce Cloud product and pricing
- `/pricing` — Full pricing for both products
- `/integrations` — All supported marketplaces and channels
- `/software-for-print-on-demand` — Print-on-demand use case
- `/multichannel-listing-software` — Multichannel listing & inventory
- `/order-management-software` — Order management
- `/inventory-management-software` — Inventory management
- `/blog` — Articles on print-on-demand operations, fulfillment, and marketplace strategy
